data.title: SelectQuote Shares Surge After Healthcare Platform Confirms $100M Securitization Deal
data.description: SelectQuote wants to reduce a portion of its outstanding term debt, as the new securitization offers a significantly lower cost of capital.

Snap-On Navigates Q3 Hurdles: Slimmer Sales, Fatter Margins, And An EPS Surprise
data.description: Snap-On Inc. reported Q3 sales of $1.147B, down 1.1% year over year and missed estimates.
